shadows.name: cabinet-ambient
shadows.purpose: Every .glass surface, at rest and hover. Never varies.

shadows.name: interactive-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons at rest; accent-driven via --accent-rgb.

shadows.name: eager-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover, paired with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focused inputs, with accent border; Signal Red variant on .invalid.

motion.name: ambient-drift
motion.purpose: Nebula background drift; disabled on mobile and under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid Amethyst Deep CTA with resting glow; lifts and brightens on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7c3aed; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.6rem 1.4rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(168,85,247,0.4); transition: all 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(168,85,247,0.55); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.7); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent secondary action with accent-tinted border; fills with accent tint on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.35); border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.6rem 1.4rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; transition: all 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(168,85,247,0.12); color: #fff; border-color: rgba(168,85,247,0.7); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.7); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Frosted cabinet: glass fill, accent-tinted border, cabinet-ambient shadow. Interactive variants brighten the border on hover.
components.html:
NanoBot

Discord moderation built for your phone. 368 commands, running in real servers.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); border: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.2); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 1.75rem; max-width: 340px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.3rem; color: #fff; margin: 0 0 0.6rem; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.65; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Glass field; focus brightens border to accent with a soft ring, Signal Red on invalid.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.2); border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.65rem 0.9rem; color: #e2e8f0; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(168,85,247,0.7); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(168,85,247,0.18); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Uppercase tracked link with accent underline sweeping in on hover.
components.html: ProjectsStackContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1rem; background: rgba(5,6,15,0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(168,85,247,0.15); } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; position: relative; transition: color 0.25s ease; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -3px; width: 0; height: 2px; background: #a855f7; border-radius: 1px; transition: width 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { width: 100%; }

components.name: Micro Action
components.description: Near-invisible at rest; hover reveals intent — accent for edit, Signal Red for delete.
components.css: .ds-micro { background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 4px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); cursor: pointer; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; line-height: 1; padding: 0.2rem 0.4rem; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-micro:hover { border-color: #a855f7; color: #a855f7; background: rgba(168,85,247,0.08); } .ds-micro-danger:hover { border-color: #ef4444; color: #ef4444; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.08); }

components.name: Cabinet Button (TI-83)
components.description: Signature in-world toy control — phosphor green quarantined inside its cabinet skin.
components.css: .ds-ti-btn { background: #001a08; border: 1px solid #003a18; color: #00ff41; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; text-align: center; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-ti-btn:hover { background: #003a18; }

narrative.overview: A dark room full of glowing machines, and every cabinet is playable. The site is a deep-space void (#05060f) washed by drifting violet nebulae, with frosted-glass cabinets floating above it. The signature Neon Amethyst (#a855f7) is not decoration — it is the arcade's light source, and light means 'touch me.' The whole system exists to make a visitor play first and realize the skill second. The single most important mechanic: the accent is a live variable — visitors re-theme the entire site through the color picker; --accent-rgb cascades everywhere. Purple is the default personality, not a constant.
keyCharacteristics: Deep-space dark, always — glass surfaces over a nebula gradient, never flat panels on gray.
Neon Amethyst glow = interactivity. Glow is a promise that something happens when you click.
Syne 800 display voice: wide, geometric, confident; JetBrains Mono whispers the technical labels.
Tactile and eager — hover states lift, brighten, and respond fast (0.15–0.3s ease-out).
Honest affordances: static content never borrows interactive styling.

rules.name: The Live Accent Rule
rules.body: Never hardcode purple. Every accent usage goes through rgba(var(--accent-rgb), α) or var(--accent) / var(--accent-dark), because the visitor's color picker re-themes the site at runtime. A hex-coded #a855f7 in a component is a bug.

rules.name: The Quarantine Rule
rules.body: Phosphor Green lives inside the TI-83 and terminal cabinets and nowhere else. One leak and the site becomes the hacker cliché PRODUCT.md bans.

rules.name: The Marquee Rule
rules.body: Syne appears at weight 700+ only. There is no 'light Syne'; the display voice is always fully lit.

rules.name: The Tracking Floor
rules.body: Display letter-spacing never goes below -0.04em (current hero value is the floor, not a starting point).

rules.name: The Honest Glow Rule
rules.body: Accent glow, hover lift, and brightening borders are reserved for elements that respond to a click or keypress. Static content never glows, never lifts, never shows a pointer cursor. A false affordance is a broken promise in an arcade.

dos: Do route every accent color through rgba(var(--accent-rgb), α) — the visitor's color picker must re-theme everything (The Live Accent Rule).
Do make every clickable thing eager: glow, lift -2px, or brighten within 150–300ms, ease / ease-out only.
Do keep body/secondary text at white/.65 or brighter on Void — that's the WCAG AA floor here; white/.45 is for disabled and meta text only.
Do ship prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for every animation, and keep the nebula drift disabled on mobile as it is now.
Do give new pages the full shared shell (nav, color-popup, cookie banner/modal, cursor-glow, scroll-top) so the arcade feels continuous.
donts: Don't put glow, hover lift, or pointer cursors on non-interactive elements — no false affordances (The Honest Glow Rule).
Don't let Phosphor Green (#00ff41) out of the TI-83/terminal cabinets; no Matrix rain, no site-wide neon green mono — PRODUCT.md bans the 'overdone hacker aesthetic' by name.
Don't build the 'generic template portfolio': no skill bars, no identical icon-heading-text card grids, no stock hero.
Don't drift toward 'corporate SaaS landing' moves: no multi-color enterprise gradients, no stat rows, no gradient text.
Don't introduce gray hexes for text or borders — neutrals are white-at-opacity, full stop.
Don't use Syne below weight 700, or track display type tighter than -0.04em.
Don't hand-edit *.min.js / styles.min.css styling conventions away — extend within the existing token vocabulary (--accent-rgb, .glass, reveal).
